fn_declaraion.fn_code:
trace_input_func (SIM_DESC sd,
			      const char *name,
			      enum op_types in1,
			      enum op_types in2,
			      enum op_types in3)

enumerate_node_list:
enum op_types {
  OP_VOID,
  OP_CONSTANT3,
  OP_UCONSTANT3,
  OP_CONSTANT4,
  OP_CONSTANT4_1,
  OP_CONSTANT5,
  OP_CONSTANT6,
  OP_CONSTANT16,
  OP_UCONSTANT16,
  OP_CONSTANT20,
  OP_UCONSTANT20,
  OP_CONSTANT32,
  OP_UCONSTANT32,
  OP_MEMREF,
  OP_MEMREF2,
  OP_MEMREF3,

  OP_DISP5,
  OP_DISP17,
  OP_DISP25,
  OP_DISPE9,
  //OP_ABS20,
  OP_ABS20_OUTPUT,
  //OP_ABS24,
  OP_ABS24_OUTPUT,

  OP_R_BASE_DISPS16,
  OP_R_BASE_DISP20,
  OP_R_BASE_DISPS20,
  OP_R_BASE_DISPE20,

  OP_RP_BASE_DISPE0,
  OP_RP_BASE_DISP4,
  OP_RP_BASE_DISPE4,
  OP_RP_BASE_DISP14,
  OP_RP_BASE_DISP16,
  OP_RP_BASE_DISP20,
  OP_RP_BASE_DISPS20,
  OP_RP_BASE_DISPE20,

  OP_R_INDEX7_ABS20,
  OP_R_INDEX8_ABS20,

  OP_RP_INDEX_DISP0,
  OP_RP_INDEX_DISP14,
  OP_RP_INDEX_DISP20,
  OP_RP_INDEX_DISPS20, 

  OP_REG,
  OP_REGP,
  OP_PROC_REG,
  OP_PROC_REGP,
  OP_COND,
  OP_RA
}

enum {
  PSR_MASK = (PSR_I_BIT
	      | PSR_P_BIT
	      | PSR_E_BIT
	      | PSR_N_BIT
	      | PSR_Z_BIT
	      | PSR_F_BIT
	      | PSR_U_BIT
	      | PSR_L_BIT
	      | PSR_T_BIT
	      | PSR_C_BIT),
  /* The following bits in the PSR _can't_ be set by instructions such
     as mvtc.  */
  PSR_HW_MASK = (PSR_MASK)
}
